title: Event Provenance
description: Common provenance information for event tracking

ingestor_version.description: Version of the ingestor that captured this event

capture_method.description: Method used to capture the event (e.g., 'inotify', 'polling', 'hook')

capture_latency_ms.description: Milliseconds between event occurrence and capture

source_reliability.description: Reliability assessment of the event source
